description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult woman standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a cropped t-shirt featuring a bold graphic on the chest and a pair of fitted jeans with a subtle pattern. Her footwear consists of simple, closed-toe flats. The figure has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders, framing her face. The facial features are stylized, with defined eyes and lips, and the overall body proportions are realistic. The clothing fits snugly, and there are no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A stylized adult woman in a T-pose, wearing a cropped graphic t-shirt, fitted jeans, and flats, with long straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, facial features, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the hair, and the fitted nature of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the t-shirt, jeans, and the full length of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual cropped t-shirt and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
